title: Iranian Strikes on Ships Test Cease-Fire and Threaten Energy Flows in Gulf
summary_full: A U.S. official said Iranian missiles struck two commercial ships. There was no immediate comment from Iranian officials on the reported attacks.
summary_public: A U.S. official said Iranian missiles struck two commercial ships. There was no immediate comment from Iranian officials on the reported attacks.
